title: Harju Jalgpallikool Dominates in Clean Sheet Masterclass!
hook: Harju Jalgpallikool secured a massive clean sheet victory!
voiceover: Harju Jalgpallikool secured a massive clean sheet victory! Hugo Palutaja sets the tone early, blasting home the opener in the seventh minute. Narva Trans feels the pressure, and a disastrous own goal by Nikita Baljabkin in the thirty-first minute makes it two-nil. Things get even worse for Narva Trans when Aleksander Filatov sees red in the seventy-eighth! Karel Eerme seals the three-nil masterclass deep in stoppage time. Hit that subscribe button for more!
caption: Harju Jalgpallikool dominates Narva Trans in a fiery 3-0 victory! 🇪🇪⚽
